matchedSlug.description: The slug of the matching existing page

relationship.description: How the extracted name relates to the matched page. Only Equivalent relationships should be included in matches.

reason.description: Explanation of why this is a semantic match

matches.description: Names that semantically match existing pages. Each extracted name must appear at most once — across both matches and unmatched.

name.description: The extracted name that had no match

reason.description: Explanation of why no existing page matched

unmatched.description: Names that have no semantic match, with reasons. Each extracted name must appear at most once — across both matches and unmatched.
